query: soft focus dreamy out of focus defocused portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: soft focus dreamy defocused portraits

response.objective_caption: Two faces in close proximity, one positioned above and to the left, the other below and to the right, with features softly diffused. The image presents human subjects in an intimate, closely framed arrangement in monochromatic gray-brown tones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two faces in close proximity rendered with heavy intentional blur that dissolves facial features into soft, indistinct shapes. The image uses extreme soft focus throughout, creating a dreamlike, ghostly atmosphere. Muted, desaturated gray-brown tones contribute to a melancholic, oppressive mood. The low contrast crushes tonal separation, producing a suffocating, emotionally distressed atmosphere where the subjects feel distant yet intimate, trapped in a hazy, indistinct space.
